---
name: Godot Change Summary Output Contract
description: Use when a response includes substantial implementation, multiple files, or architecture impact. Enforce concise change summary, compatibility impact, risk notes, and follow-up actions.
---
# Godot Change Summary Output Contract

## Cross-References
- Refer to `godot-expert-workflow.instructions.md` and applicable scoped companion instructions for precedence and details.

## Summary Requirement
- For substantial changes, include a concise change summary section.
- Keep the summary focused on user-visible and architecture-relevant outcomes.

## Required Sections
- What changed.
- Why it changed.
- Impact and compatibility notes.
- Risks or known gaps.
- Follow-up options.
